'''Knave Three''' was the callsign of a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] serving in the [[New Republic Starfighter Corps/Legends|New Republic Starfighter Corps]] during the later stages of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] joined the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] as a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and was assigned to [[Knave Squadron]], a squadron of [[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wings]] which was part of the [[New Republic Starfighter Corps/Legends|New Republic Starfighter Corps]]. Going by the callsign Knave Three, the bearded Human flew his craft during the [[Battle of Calamari|battle]] over [[Dac/Legends|Dac]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]. Attacking the enemy craft of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Knave Three's starfighter sustained damaged during the battle over the [[Calamari Sea]]. While the pilot attempted to eject from his doomed craft, he was killed when the starfighter crashed into the hull of the World Devastator ''[[Silencer-7]]''.<ref name="DE4" />

==Appearances==
*[[Dark Empire 4|''Dark Empire'' 4]] {{1st}}
